macro.comment: Count the number of variadic arguments in a macro\nUsed like __VA_NARG__(__VA_ARGS__)
macro.name: #ifndef __VA_NARG__

macro.comment: Amount of time in nanoseconds it takes for the GPU to timeout
macro.name: #define BS_TIMEOUT
#define BS_OBJECT(type, source_id, id, swaps_count, flags)
macro.line: bs_object(source_id, id, sizeof(type), BS_SWAP_SIZE(type), swaps_count, flags)

macro.name: #define BS_WRITE_BIT(array, index, value)
macro.line: do { if (value) BS_SET_BIT(array, index); else BS_CLEAR_BIT(array, index); } while (0)

function.name: bs_eulToQ
function.comment: Convert euler angles (radians) to a quaternion

function.name: bs_orthographic
function.body: glm_ortho(left, right, bottom, top, near_z, far_z, out->v);

function.name: bs_sign
function.comment: Returns -1 if the value is negative, 1 if positive, 0 if the value is 0

function.name: bs_charStringF
